_comment: 패널 타입별 카메라 구도, 피사체, 구성 규칙.

wide.name: Wide Establishing Shot
wide.description: 전경 와이드샷. 무대 전체, 세계관 소개.
wide.camera: wide establishing shot, low angle looking up at the stage
wide.subject: full skeleton band on stage, entire cyberpunk city skyline visible, neon magenta moon prominent
wide.composition: band centered, city towers on both sides, moon directly above
wide.depth: deep field, multiple layers: crowd foreground, stage midground, city background

medium.name: Medium Performance Shot
medium.description: 상반신 미디엄샷. 연주 장면, 퍼포먼스 에너지.
medium.camera: medium shot from waist up, three-quarter angle
medium.subject: specific band member performing, instrument prominently visible, expressive body language
medium.composition: subject fills two-thirds of frame, stage and city background visible
medium.depth: shallow focus on performer, soft background

closeup.name: Emotion Close-up
closeup.camera: extreme close-up on skull face, eye-level or slight tilt up
closeup.subject: skeleton face, hollow eye sockets with faint glow, expressive pose
closeup.composition: face fills most of frame, minimal background visible

silhouette.name: Silhouette Against Moon
silhouette.description: 달 앞 실루엣. 분위기 전환, 인트로/아웃트로.
silhouette.subject: full body silhouette of band or vocalist against glowing neon magenta moon
silhouette.composition: dark silhouette against bright moon, no facial detail
silhouette.depth: pure outline shape, no fill detail

detail.name: Instrument Detail Shot
detail.description: 악기/손 디테일. 연주 기술, 버스 전환.
detail.camera: tight close-up on hands and instrument
detail.subject: stylized cartoon fingers on strings, drumsticks, microphone stand — specific instrument focus
detail.composition: hands and instrument fill frame, slight angle to show depth

crowd.name: Crowd Reaction Shot
crowd.description: 관객 반응 원경. 공연의 규모감, 프리코러스.
crowd.camera: wide crowd angle, slightly elevated looking toward stage
crowd.subject: crowd silhouettes in foreground, skeleton band on stage in distance, magenta lights overhead
crowd.composition: crowd fills bottom third, stage in upper center, moon visible
crowd.depth: deep field, crowd sharp, stage slightly soft

atmosphere.name: Atmospheric Background
atmosphere.description: 배경/분위기 패널. 인물 없음, 세계관 묘사, 전환부.
atmosphere.subject: cyberpunk city, neon magenta moon, empty stage, smoke and particles — no characters

text.name: Lyric Text Panel
text.description: 가사 자막 패널. 배경 이미지 위 가사 오버레이 (편집 단계에서 추가).
text.subject: background atmosphere image + lyric overlay text
text._note: 이 타입은 이미지 생성이 아닌 편집 단계에서 처리. prompt 파일 불필요.
